title: Sarvam AI launches ‘Chanakya’ vertical for secure, mission-critical AI
description: Sarvam AI has launched its ‘Chanakya’ vertical to deliver secure, mission-critical AI solutions for enterprises and government sectors, as it expands beyond consumer tools and explores fundraising talks with major investors.

title: France's Mistral raises $830 million in debt for AI data centre build-up
description: The deal, set to be announced on Monday, marks Mistral's first debt raising and underscores growing investor confidence in European AI firms as they seek to challenge the dominance of US tech giants like Microsoft, Google and Amazon in cloud computing and AI services.
